description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomy, traveling northeast on Mission St, was stopped in lane for a red traffic light at 9th Street. A 
SamTrans bus (Vehicle 2), with a front-mounted triple-bike rack extending past the width of the bus on the driver's side, was traveling 
southeast on 9th Street and attempting a right turn onto Mission St. The protruding edge of the bike rack was encroaching into the Zoox 
vehicle's travel lane as the bus was executing the right hand turn. As the light turned green the Zoox vehicle inched forward and attempted 
to steer away from the bus. Just as the safety operator disengaged from autonomy, the protruding edge of the bike rack made contact with 
the driver's side fender on the Zoox vehicle. There were no reported injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
